question_pattern: A user asks whether an unknown third-party payment can be booked because invoice numbers match.
answer_problem: The answer was substantively good but too long before the action block.
what_i_liked: It said do not book first, used HOLD, listed needed facts, and put executive summary at the end.
what_failed: The first screen still included more detail than needed.
suggested_fix: Keep the first screen to status, role, HOLD, DO NOW, DO NOT, and one mini-table. Move scripts below.
